```python
from datetime import datetime

# EU AI Act 关键时间节点计算
today = datetime(2026, 3, 19)

dates = {
    " regulation published": "2024-06-13",
    "entry into force": "2024-08-01",
    "prohibited practices (6m)": "2025-02-02",
    "general purpose AI rules (12m)": "2025-08-01",
    "high-risk systems (24m)": "2026-08-01",
    "full applicability (36m)": "2027-08-01",
}

high_risk_deadline = datetime(2026, 8, 1)
days_until = (high_risk_deadline - today).days

print("=== EU AI Act Timeline ===")
for k, v in dates.items():
    print(f"{k}: {v}")
print(f"\n距高风险系统合规截止: {days_until} 天")
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
